notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.detail: Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Alex Call scores. Will Smith out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.
